scripts.prebuild: npm run images:hero:ci && npm run content:refresh && npm run images:content:ci && npm run awin:sync:ci && npm run partners:generate && npm run amazon:sync && npm run content:inventory && npm run content:generate:pseo:ci && npm run content:refresh && npm run content:inventory && npm run images:enrich:ci && npm run sitemap:generate
scripts.build:with-images: npm run images:hero && npm run images:content && npm run images:enrich:force && astro build
scripts.build:with-amazon: npm run amazon:sync && npm run build:fast
scripts.awin:sync:ci: node scripts/sync-awin.mjs || echo "AWIN sync failed or skipped; continuing build with existing AWIN data"
scripts.content:generate:pseo:ci: node scripts/content/generate-pseo-opportunity-pages.mjs --mode=clusters --limit=12 --apply || echo "AWIN-led PSEO cluster generation failed or skipped; continuing build"
scripts.affiliate:sync: npm run awin:sync && npm run partners:generate && npm run amazon:sync && npm run content:generate:pseo:clusters
scripts.images:hero:ci: node scripts/enrich-home-hero-images.mjs || echo "Homepage hero image enrichment failed or skipped; continuing build with existing hero images"
scripts.images:content:ci: node scripts/enrich-content-images.mjs --apply --limit 80 || echo "Pexels content image enrichment failed or skipped; continuing build with existing images"
scripts.images:enrich:ci: node scripts/enrich-breed-image-gallery.mjs --force --count 5 || echo "Image enrichment failed; continuing build with existing image data"
